ogTitle: Girrawheen vs Glen Forrest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Girrawheen and Glen Forrest.
heading: Girrawheen vs Glen Forrest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Girrawheen, Western Australia and Glen Forrest, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Forrest has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Girrawheen (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Girrawheen or Glen Forrest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Girrawheen has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Glen Forrest scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Girrawheen scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Forrest scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Girrawheen or Glen Forrest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Forrest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
